query:
SELECT DISTINCT
            s.album as album_name,
            s.artist as artist_name,
            COUNT(*) as song_count,
            0::INTEGER as processed_count,
            'unprocessed'::TEXT as status,
            NULL::TEXT as notes,
            NOW() as updated_at
        FROM songs s
        WHERE s.album IS NOT NULL AND s.artist IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY s.album, s.artist
        ORDER BY updated_at DESC
        LIMIT $1::BIGINT
        OFFSET $2::BIGINT
